title: Scrubbing tool output inside an agentic loop
focus: A practical how-to for wrapping every tool-call result (ls, git log, cat, grep, file reads) in an agentic coding loop so identifiers from the host machine never reach the next LLM turn, including the message-array scrub shape, the gaps the current detector set leaves in tool output, and the inspect-first workflow to verify what is and is not caught.
